  "brief_explanation": "Alice's tax liability is calculated by applying the progressive tax rates to her income: 10% on $10,000, 15% on $40,000 (income over $10,000 and up to $50,000), and 20% on $25,000 (income over $90,000). The total tax is the sum of these amounts."
